creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Trying to build www/firefox leads to problems (at least with Alsa
configured); I previously had set it to OSS and got complaints that
WEBRTC required ALSA:

$ cd /usr/ports/www/firefox
$ make pretty-print-config
+DBUS -DEBUG -GCONF -GIO -GNOMEUI -GNOMEVFS2 -GSTREAMER -LIBPROXY
-LOGGING -OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS -PGO +WEBRTC AUDIO( +ALSA -OSS -PULSEAUDIO ) 
$ make
...
